Main - Materials - Polymer liners for trenchless repairs

Polymer liners for trenchless repairs

Polymer sleeve SP!RES-Liner DN100 (4 mm wall)

A standard sleeve for restoring pipes with a diameter of 100 mm. The length is from 3 to 12 meters. Polymerization time: 60-90 min.

More detailed

A standard sleeve for restoring pipes with a diameter of 100 mm. The length is from 3 to 12 meters. Polymerization time: 60-90 min.
